name: tasks-plugin
description: Kanban for humans, MCP for agents. One board, same tasks. Per-project columns, task types, authored comments, eighteen MCP tools.
author: Plekt

tools.name: list_tasks
tools.description: List tasks with optional filters for status, priority range, project_id, type_id, assignee_id, and result limit.

status.description: Filter by board column status name.

type_id.description: Filter tasks by task type ID.

assignee_id.description: Filter tasks by assignee user ID.

tools.name: create_task
tools.description: Create a new task. Title is required. Response includes web_url with a link to the task.

status.description: Board column status name. Defaults to pending.

tools.name: get_task
tools.description: Retrieve a single task by its integer ID.

tools.name: update_task
tools.description: Update one or more fields on an existing task by ID. Only supplied fields are changed.

tools.name: delete_task
tools.description: Permanently delete a task by ID. Cascade-deletes associated comments. Returns deleted=true if the row existed.

tools.name: get_task_detail
tools.description: Retrieve a task with its comments, type info, and board columns.

tools.name: list_board_columns
tools.description: List board columns (statuses) ordered by position. IMPORTANT: board columns are SCOPED PER PROJECT — each project has its own columns. Pass project_id to get a project's columns; omit it to get global columns (project_id IS NULL), which are NOT visible on any project's kanban board. To see what columns a project's board uses, always pass that project's id.

project_id.description: Project to list columns for. Omit for global (orphan) columns.

tools.name: create_board_column
tools.description: Create a new board column (status). CRITICAL: columns are SCOPED PER PROJECT. You MUST pass project_id to create a column visible on that project's kanban board. Omitting project_id creates a GLOBAL orphan column (project_id IS NULL) that is invisible in every project's UI — almost never what you want. The (name, project_id) pair must be unique.

project_id.description: REQUIRED for the column to appear on a project's board. Omit only if you intentionally want a global orphan column (rare).

tools.name: update_board_column
tools.description: Update a board column's label, position, or color. The column is identified by its global id; project scoping is preserved.

tools.name: delete_board_column
tools.description: Delete a custom board column. Default columns (pending/in_progress/done) and columns with tasks cannot be deleted. Identified by global id regardless of project scope.

tools.name: create_task_type
tools.description: Create a new task type with optional color and icon.

tools.name: update_task_type
tools.description: Update a task type's label, color, or icon.

tools.name: delete_task_type
tools.description: Delete a task type. Tasks with this type will have type_id cleared.

tools.name: list_comments
tools.description: List comments for a task, ordered by creation time.

tools.name: create_comment
tools.description: Add a comment to a task. IMPORTANT: Always set author_name (e.g. 'Claude') and author_type='agent' when posting as an AI assistant.

author_type.description: Type of author. Defaults to user.

tools.name: update_comment
tools.description: Update the body of an existing comment by ID.

widgets.title: Recent Tasks
widgets.description: Latest 5 tasks by creation date with status.
